title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.007 - Presumption against implied repealer
text:
115.007.  Presumption against implied repealer. — No provision of this chapter shall be construed as impliedly amended or repealed by subsequent legislation if such construction can be reasonably avoided.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 1.015, A.L. 2013 S.B. 99, A.L. 2018 S.B. 592 merged with S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision) 
Effective 8-28-18 (S.B. 975 & 1024 Revision); 11-07-18 (S.B. 592)
